title: Fundamental tightness pushed markets higher
summary:
Main
Supply risks continued to dominate sentiment in commodity markets, aided by a weaker USD, which supported investor appetite. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-04-08 104049.png | assets/2024-04-08_fundamental-tightness-pushed-markets-higher_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_22fd4094ce87.png
Crude oil held on recent gains as rising tensions in the Middle East raise concerns of supply disruptions. Israel scrambled navigational signals over Tel Aviv as the country prepares for a potential Iranian attack.
